hero.tagline: I build high-performance distributed systems and modern web applications.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.title: Passionate about systems that scale
about.bio1: Final-year engineering student at ENSA Al Hoceima, I specialize in Cloud-Native architectures and distributed systems. My journey blends academic rigor with real-world experience — from building complex Odoo modules at TechPal to deploying distributed banking systems with Kafka and Kubernetes.
about.bio2: What sets me apart? I don't just code features — I think architecture, scalability, resilience and observability from day one. Available from July 2026 for a junior position or international remote opportunity.

stack.label: TECH STACK
stack.title: Technologies I work with
stack.subtitle: From backend architecture to modern interfaces — each bar reflects real-world experience.

projects.label: PROJECTS
projects.title: Things I've built
projects.subtitle: From distributed systems to AI-powered apps

devscope.title: DevScope
devscope.description: GitHub profile analyzer powered by Groq AI. Generates detailed reports on a developer's skills, activity and technologies from their GitHub profile.

bankingMs.title: Banking Microservices
bankingMs.description: Complete banking microservices architecture with Spring Cloud, Kafka, Kubernetes and Docker. Account management, transactions, real-time notifications.

taskpro.title: TaskPro
taskpro.description: Collaborative task management application with WebSocket for real-time updates, JWT authentication and modern React interface.

smartcollab.title: SmartCollab
smartcollab.description: Real-time team collaboration platform with Socket.io, Redis for session management and event-driven Node.js architecture.

pfeTechpal.title: PFE TechPal
pfeTechpal.description: E-commerce platform built on Odoo 17 with Python, paired with a Flutter mobile application. Final year project in progress.

techpal.description: Development and maintenance of custom Odoo 17 modules in Python. PostgreSQL database management, REST API creation and third-party system integration.

isbMaroc.description: Development of modern user interfaces with React and JavaScript. REST API integration, responsive design and performance optimization.

pfeTechpal.description: Design and development of a complete e-commerce platform on Odoo 17 with Python, paired with a cross-platform Flutter mobile application. Final year internship.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.intro: I'm open to remote work opportunities. Feel free to reach out to discuss your projects.
